stemHtml: A serious incident involved an A330 losing engine cowling after take-off from Sydney. There was no engine fire. The crew dumped fuel and returned. Why did they dump fuel, and at what minimum altitude?

options.a: To reduce landing weight; minimum altitude 6000 ft.
options.b: To reduce landing weight; minimum altitude 8000 ft.
options.c: To reduce landing weight; minimum altitude 12 000 ft.
options.d: To reduce landing weight; minimum altitude 4000 ft.
